title: Sneak Tweak
body:
**Sneak Tweak** lets you tweak the sneak animation you see when pressing or releasing the sneak key.

### Options
- Modify the animation speed
- Disable the smooth animation
- Increase the sneaking eye height

Additionally, this mod fixes the annoying sneak bug (MC-159163) that Mojang hasn't fixed yet.

**Requires [CompleteConfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/completeconfig) to be downloaded seperately.**

To adjust the settings, either use the config file at config/sneaktweak.conf or open the ingame config via Mod Menu (requires [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)).

This Fabric mod is highly inspired by the equivalent Forge Mod SneakAnimation.
